message:
fix: update Pods and Workloads test mocks after contributor badges PR (#9389)

The useToast import moved from hooks/useToast to components/ui/Toast
in PR #9105. Update vi.mock paths to match the new import location.
Also fix Workloads status color tests to set customFilter (required
for individual deployment view) and guard the Pods empty state test
against the beforeEach that populates mockPodIssues.

Fixes #9385

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
